name: StableEmail
description: Pay-per-send email delivery. No API keys, no accounts. Buy inboxes, send emails, and manage custom subdomains - all via x402 payments.

endpoints.description: Buy an inbox on stableemail.dev for 30 days. Optional forwardTo for email forwarding, or use as programmatic mailbox via messages API
Read a single inbox message - returns text, HTML, and attachment download URLs (1hr expiry)
Send email from your forwarding inbox on stableemail.dev
Top up a forwarding inbox for 30 days
Top up a forwarding inbox for 90 days (save 17%)
Top up a forwarding inbox for 365 days (save 34%)
Purchase a custom email subdomain on stableemail.dev
Create an inbox on your subdomain. Max 100 inboxes, 500 messages each. Message content retained for 90 days
List messages in a subdomain inbox
Read a single subdomain inbox message - returns text, HTML, and attachment download URLs (1hr expiry)
Send email from your custom subdomain on stableemail.dev

note: StableEmail provides instant email services via x402. Features: (1) Quick Send - $0.02 per email from relay@stableemail.dev, (2) Forwarding Inbox - $1/month for email forwarding or programmatic access, (3) Custom Subdomain - $5 for your-name.stableemail.dev with up to 100 inboxes, (4) Message Storage - 90 days retention for all messages and attachments. No API keys required - authenticate with x402 payment. Supports email forwarding, programmatic inbox access, and custom branding via subdomains.
